title: 2026 Golden Globes Predictions - Rotten Tomatoes
text: Rotten Tomatoes predictions for the 2026 Golden Globes by Jacqueline Coley note that this awards season reflects industry turbulence with reduced guild participation. In the Best Actor Drama category, Wagner Moura in The Secret Agent is predicted to win. The ceremony, airing January 11 on CBS, features predictions across all categories. The article describes the race as reflecting broader unpredictability in voting due to employment challenges affecting member engagement.
